solution.p: To use the quadratic formula, we identify a=1\text{,} b=-4.7\text{,} and c=-4.9\text{.}

The solution set is approximately {\left\{-0.87839,5.57839\right\}}\text{.} Note that since we started with decimal coefficients, we felt it was acceptible to round the solutions to decimal approximations rather than keep to the exact solutions.
